meta.disclaimer: This text is for informational purposes only; for binding interpretation, please consult the competent authorities.

shared.formConsentNotice: By submitting this form, you accept our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: As Kıta Plastik ve Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret Limited Şirketi ("Kıta Plastik", "we"), we hereby inform you about the personal data we process under Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data ("KVKK"). On our website we process only the minimum data strictly necessary for contact and catalog requests; we do not use third-party advertising cookies or user tracking.

purposes.heading: 2. Purposes of Processing Personal Data
bullets: Sending the catalog you requested to your email address
Responding to messages submitted via the contact form
Conducting quotation and feasibility processes related to our services
Preventing bots and unsolicited requests (technical protection via Cloudflare Turnstile)
Documenting our services within the scope of legal obligations (audit log)

legalBasis.heading: 3. Legal Basis
legalBasis.body: Your personal data is processed on the legal grounds of KVKK Art. 5/2-(c) necessity for the establishment and performance of a contract, Art. 5/2-(e) necessity for the establishment and protection of our rights, and Art. 5/2-(f) necessity for our legitimate interest. No processing requiring explicit consent is carried out.

table.data: Full name, email, company (optional), phone (optional), subject, message content
Audit log records (IP is not stored — only operation type and timestamp)

thirdParties.heading: 5. Transfers & Third Parties
thirdParties.body: We share your data only with the following service providers (data processors), and only to perform the defined function. No advertising, marketing, or analytics data is sold.

table.safeguards: Uses no cookies, IP is hashed
Uses no cookies, sensitive data is filtered

retention.heading: 6. Retention Periods
retention.body: We retain your data only for as long as necessary for the purpose of processing:

table.basis: Reply to your message + potential legal obligation

rights.heading: 7. Data Subject Rights (KVKK Art. 11)
bullets: Learning whether your personal data is being processed
Requesting information if it has been processed
Learning the purpose of processing and whether it is used in line with that purpose
Learning the third parties to whom data has been transferred domestically or abroad
Requesting correction if data has been processed incompletely or incorrectly
Requesting deletion or destruction when the conditions are met
Requesting that correction/deletion be communicated to the third parties to whom data was transferred
Objecting to an adverse outcome arising from automated analysis
Requesting compensation for damages incurred due to unlawful processing

application.heading: 8. Application Method
application.body: To exercise your rights under KVKK Art. 13, you may submit a written application to info@kitaplastik.com. Your application will be concluded within at most 30 days. For a detailed application guide, you may consult the KVKK Official Website.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Our website uses only strictly necessary (essential) cookies; we do not place cookies for advertising, marketing, or user tracking purposes. For this reason, we do not display a cookie consent banner — all cookies we use fall within the category technically required for the website to function (ePrivacy Directive Article 5(3) exemption).

what.heading: 1. What Is a Cookie?
what.body: Cookies are small text files saved to your browser by the websites you visit. Site owners can use these files to remember your preferences, store session information, or perform site analytics. Not all cookies are in the same category — some are essential for the site to function, while others are optional.

approach.heading: 2. Our Approach
approach.body: The Kıta Plastik website uses only three categories of strictly necessary technical cookies: language preference (locale), bot protection (Cloudflare Turnstile), and infrastructure protection (Cloudflare bot management). All of these are required to provide the site's core functions; no advertising, profiling, or cross-site tracking is performed.

table.name: cf_chl_*
table.purpose: Cloudflare Turnstile bot protection (on form submissions)

control.heading: 4. Browser Control
control.body: You can reject or delete cookies from your browser settings. However, if strictly necessary cookies are disabled, core functions such as form submissions and language preference may not work correctly. For browser-specific guidance, see the help pages of your browser provider (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).

changes.heading: 5. Policy Changes
changes.body: When this policy is updated, the Last Updated date is revised and the text is published on this page. For significant changes, we will provide notice via the website.
